subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! Today, whosoever hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and attained unto the recognition of God, glorified be His majesty, he [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق امروز هر نفسی بافق اعلی اقبال نمود و بعرفان حق جل جلاله فائز گشت او
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
